reason: A Nazi industrialist risks everything to save lives, embodying true integrity against overwhelming odds.
A lone juror stands against prejudice to ensure justice, showing unwavering moral conviction.
A devoted butler grapples with loyalty and conscience, ultimately confronting his own moral duty.
A submarine captain defies orders to prevent catastrophic injustice, choosing principle over power.
A young lawyer exposes his corrupt firm, risking career and safety to uphold the law.
An insider reveals a rigged quiz show, risking reputation to pursue honest truth.
A sports agent leaves his firm over ethical concerns, embracing personal integrity over profit.
An executive fights sexual harassment at work, standing up for integrity despite personal risk.
A lawyer battles discrimination, choosing principle and justice in the face of adversity.
A nun supports a condemned man, confronting moral complexities with compassion and conviction.
